295.reason:
j is an integer index representing the current position in the string, not a character. Comparing it to '
' (ASCII 10) is logically incorrect. It should check content.charAt(j) == '
' (or content.charAt(j-1) == '
') to properly count line numbers. Additionally, the while loop lacks a bounds check (j < content.length()), which will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException if the comment is unclosed or reaches the end of the file.
